description_long: This is a two-story house situated on a spacious, landscaped lot with a mix of open grassy areas, trees, and several outbuildings. The main structure features a rectangular footprint with a prominent central entryway, flanked by symmetrical windows and a paved driveway leading up to the front. The roof is a simple gable style, and the house is surrounded by a low fence and a variety of garden elements, including shrubs and small trees. There are additional structures on the property, such as a detached garage and smaller sheds, as well as a paved walkway connecting the main house to these outbuildings. The property is bordered by tall, slender trees on one side, providing a sense of privacy and enclosure. The overall setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural residential environment with ample outdoor space for recreation and gardening.
description: A two-story gable-roofed house with symmetrical windows, a central entryway, and landscaped grounds featuring trees, outbuildings, and a driveway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the driveway side, highlighting the main entry, front lawn, and a detached garage in the background.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a wide, frontal perspective with the house centered, flanked by tall trees and outbuildings, emphasizing the symmetrical layout.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from an angle, revealing the side garden, additional trees, and a shed at the rear of the property.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a straight-on view of the house's front facade, with the row of tall trees and the main entryway clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, flanked by windows, and a paved approach; no porch or columns visible.
